behavior_analysis.behavior: Top oven door opens downwards on a bottom hinge.

behavior_analysis.behavior: Bottom oven door opens downwards on a bottom hinge.

behavior_analysis.behavior: Control knobs are rotatable to adjust oven settings (e.g., temperature, mode).

behavior_analysis.behavior: Digital control panel allows for pressing or tapping to set time and functions.
